channel.title: nordin.work
channel.description: A developer blog by Johan Nordin covering .NET, Azure, and web development.

item.title: How this site is built, part 2: adding a blog with MDSvex
item.description: MDSvex turns Markdown files into Svelte components. Here's how I wired it up for this blog.
item.author: Johan Nordin

item.title: Mocking API dependencies with jsonbin.io and ASP.NET Core
item.description: Use jsonbin.io as a lightweight JSON store to mock external API responses during development.
item.author: Johan Nordin

item.title: Custom domains on GitHub Pages
item.description: Buy a domain, point DNS at GitHub, add a CNAME file — you're done.
item.author: Johan Nordin

item.title: How this site is built, part 1: SvelteKit + GitHub Pages
item.description: A quick walkthrough of the stack — SvelteKit, adapter-static, and gh-pages deployment.
item.author: Johan Nordin

item.title: Welcome to my blog!
item.description: Finally a place to put my thoughts on webdev, Azure, and .NET.
item.author: Johan Nordin
